## 3. Scope
**In scope**
- <…>

**Out of scope**
- <…>

### 3.1 Variant / Options Matrix (for selection)
When the feature implies multiple product types / channels / configurations,
Clarify proposes candidate options for the user to choose — **not** an assumed
choice. Pick one (or more) by ID in the Answer Sheet (§16).
| ID | Variant | Key differentiators | … |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| V1 | <option A> | <…> | <…> |
| V2 | <option B> | <…> | <…> |

### 3.2 Customer Journey (end-to-end)
Ordered user steps from entry to result — include steps before/after the core
action and the authentication/confirmation step.
1. <entry> 2. <choose/see info> 3. <enter details + source/options>
4. <preview> 5. <accept terms> → <authenticate OTP/PIN/biometric>
6. <process> → <result> 7. <view detail / next action>

### 3.3 Screen Information / Display Matrix
| Screen name | Purpose | Display fields | User actions | Validation | Error / empty / loading states | UX / content notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <list> | <help user choose> | <options, eligibility, key terms> | <select / filter / compare> | <eligible items only?> | <empty / unavailable / loading> | <plain labels> |
| <input> | <collect details> | <amount/details/source/options> | <enter / select / continue> | <required, min/max, permission> | <invalid input / unavailable source> | <helper copy> |
| <confirmation summary> | <review before commitment> | <amount, terms, dates, expected result, source, terms checkbox> | <accept / authenticate / cancel> | <terms accepted, auth required> | <auth unavailable / changed terms> | <no technical jargon> |
| <result> | <show outcome> | <success/failure/pending, reference, next step> | <view detail / retry / contact support> | <n/a> | <unknown / timeout / failed> | <message matches error map> |
| <detail> | <review completed or pending object> | <status, key values, dates, actions> | <manage / download / close> | <action eligibility> | <not found / pending> | <business status shown> |

| <CODE_001> | <…> | <…> | <unchanged / pending / active> | <failed / timeout / unknown / reversed> | <plain message> | yes/no | <…> | yes/no |

## 15. Suggested Additional Capabilities (for confirmation)
Proactive recommendations to make the product complete — **not yet agreed scope**.
Each is a `SUGGESTION` for you to accept/reject (reply by ID in §16); none is a
confirmed requirement or an invented business rule.
- **S1** — SUGGESTION: <capability (config/admin, reconciliation, reporting,
  notification, audit, migration, serving job …)> — rationale: <why>.
- **S2** — SUGGESTION: <…> — rationale: <…>.

## 16. Answer Sheet (copy, fill in, send back)
Copy this block, fill after each ID, and paste it back — `improve` applies it by ID.
```text
# Variant — pick one id (see §3.1):
Variant: V1
# Assumptions — keep | override: <value>
A1: keep
A2: keep
# Open questions — your answer (or "skip"):
Q1:
Q2:
# Suggestions — yes | no | later:
S1:
S2:
```
